zh.lifeSummary: 當Avice Hillson於1542年2月出生在英國倫敦時，她的父親Robert Hillson22歲，母親Lady Margaret Hillson20歲。她於1566年8月4日與William Gorsuch在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 瑪麗 亞特 希爾 煙雨 聖 安德魯 賀伯特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1571年10月27日在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 斯蒂芬 沃爾布盧可 煙雨 聖 貝尼特 黑雷格享年29歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦沃爾布盧可 聖 斯分恩斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Avice Hillson于1542年2月出生在英国倫敦时，她的父亲Robert Hillson22岁，母亲Lady Margaret Hillson20岁。她于1566年8月4日与William Gorsuch在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 瑪麗 亞特 希爾 煙雨 聖 安德魯 賀伯特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1571年10月27日在英国英格兰倫敦聖 斯蒂芬 沃爾布盧可 煙雨 聖 貝尼特 黑雷格享年29岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦沃爾布盧可 聖 斯分恩斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Hillson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Avice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French form of the ancient Germanic name Aveza, derived from a short form of one or more compound names containing the first element av (as in Ava ; the meaning is uncertain). The correspondence in form to the Latin word avis ‘bird’ is coincidental.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Avice Hillson was born in February 1542, in London, England, her father, Robert Hillson, was 22 and her mother, Lady Margaret Hillson, was 20. She married William Gorsuch on 4 August 1566, in London St Mary at Hill with St Andrew Hubbard, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 27 October 1571, in St Stephen Walbrook with St Benet Sherehog, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 29, and was buried in Walbrook St Stephen's Church, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Avice Hillson est née en février 1542, à Londres, Angleterre, son père, Robert Hillson, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Hillson, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé William Gorsuch le 4 août 1566, à London St Mary at Hill with St Andrew Hubbard, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 octobre 1571, à St Stephen Walbrook with St Benet Sherehog, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterrée à Walbrook St Stephen's Church, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Avice Hillson im Februar 1542 in London, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Hillson 22 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Hillson 20. Sie hat am 4. August 1566 in London St Mary at Hill with St Andrew Hubbard, Middlesex, England William Gorsuch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. Oktober 1571 im Alter von 29 Jahren in St Stephen Walbrook with St Benet Sherehog, London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Walbrook St Stephen's Church, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Avice Hillson è nata il nel febbraio 1542 nel London, England, sua padre, Robert Hillson, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret Hillson, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato William Gorsuch il 4 agosto 1566, nel London St Mary at Hill with St Andrew Hubbard, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 27 ottobre 1571, nel St Stephen Walbrook with St Benet Sherehog, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolta a Walbrook St Stephen's Church, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Avice Hillsonが1542年2月にイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父Robert Hillsonは22歳，母Lady Margaret Hillsonは20歳であった。1566年8月4日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト マリー アト ヒル ウィス スト アンドリュー ハバードでWilliam Gorsuchと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1571年10月27日にイギリスイギリスロンドンスト ステフン ワルブルーク ウィス スト ベンエット シェレhオグで29歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンワルブルーク スト ステフエン'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Avice Hillson(이)가 1542년 2월 영국 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Hillson(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Hillson(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1566년 8월 4일 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 메리 앳 힐 위스 스트 앤드루 후브바드에서 William Gorsuch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1571년 10월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 스티븐 월브룩 위스 스트 베넷 셔호그에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 월브룩 스트 스테프'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Avice Hillson nasceu em fevereiro de 1542, em London, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Hillson, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Hillson, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com William Gorsuch em 4 de agosto de 1566, em London St Mary at Hill with St Andrew Hubbard, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de outubro de 1571, em St Stephen Walbrook with St Benet Sherehog, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 29 anos, e foi sepultada em Walbrook St Stephen's Church, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Avice Hillson родилась февраль 1542 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Hillson было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Hillson, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Gorsuch 4 августа 1566 г. в местности лондон ст мэри ат хилл вит ст андрю хуббард, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 27 октября 1571 г. в местности ст стифен валбрук вит ст бинет ширэог, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 29 лет и была похоронена в местности валбрук ст стифен'с чурч, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Avice Hillson nació en febrero de 1542, en London, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Hillson, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Hillson, tenía 20 años. Se casó con William Gorsuch el 4 de agosto de 1566, en London St Mary at Hill with St Andrew Hubbard, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 27 de octubre de 1571, en St Stephen Walbrook with St Benet Sherehog, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultada en Walbrook St Stephen's Church, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
